form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 40-day let-up. First-up after 10 months got back early 8th of 10 at this track Cl1 on February 28 over 1117m, 5.5 len behind Salvado carrying 58.5kg at $71. Previously second-up 7th of 14 at this track Mdn on May 4 over 1207m, 3 len behind Our Little Gem with 58kg at $151. Prepared to risk.

form.formComment: Gelding by Rommel on debut. Runner-up in a Belmont Park trial over 1000m on March 16. Has shown enough at the trials to suggest he can run well on debut.

form.formComment: Comes off a 49 day let-up. Most recently sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 12 at this track Mdn on February 19 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Archenemy with 54kg at $31. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track Mdn on February 5 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Gold Lightning carrying 54kg at $20. Going well. Won't be far away.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at Dongara Mdn on April 4 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Another Chant with 56kg at $3.20. The start before that sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at this track Mdn on February 28 over 1117m, 1.0 len behind Dazzling Bobby with 56kg at $8. Racing well recently and can go one better today.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at Kalgoorlie Mdn April 25 over 1400m, soft track; 4 len behind Bang For Buck carrying 53kg at $20. Previously first up; sixth of 14 at Esperance Mdn February 14 2025 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Tanksforthememory carrying 56kg at $11. Not out of this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

Lay outwards rounding the home turn.
Raced wide throughout. Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign second of 8 at this track Mdn October 1 over 1413m, 2 len behind Must Be Nice with 56kg at $2.60. On debut fourth of 14 at Belmont Park Mdn August 6 over 1200m, soft track; 2 len behind My Authoritah with 56kg at $10. Nice trial coming in and she can play a leading role.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 9 at this track Mdn on March 13 over 1200m, 6 len behind Rubick Delight with 56kg at $5. The start before that 3rd of 10 at this track Cl1 on February 28 over 1117m, 1.4 len behind Salvado carrying 57kg at $31. She's better than she showed last time out and she can bounce back to her best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the middle stages. Lay outwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming today after only having had one start and then had 11 months break. At debut last start ran last of 16 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on May 28 over 1400m, 26 len behind Opportunistic carrying 55.5kg at $17. Had four recent trials to get ready for this. Last trial fourth over 1100m in a Geraldton trial on March 13. Will take great benefit from this outing.
